settings.maxSelectionCharsDesc: Selections exceeding this character count will not be translated.
settings.debounceDesc: How long to wait after text selection before translating, in milliseconds.
settings.requestTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for the local model to respond, in milliseconds.
settings.customPromptDesc: The default prompt is pre-filled here. You can edit and save directly.
settings.cleanOutput: Clean empty lines, thinking and extra text from output
settings.cleanOutputDesc: Automatically remove quotes, code blocks, translation tags and thinking residue.
settings.debugLoggingDesc: Log request status and error summaries to the developer console.
settings.topKDesc: Limit the number of candidate tokens.
settings.repeatPenaltyDesc: Reduce the probability of repeated output.
settings.numPredictDesc: Maximum number of tokens to generate per request.

notice.selectTextFirst: Please select text in the current document first.

error.selectLocalModel: Please select a local model in plugin settings.
error.fillApiKey: Please fill in the Cloud API Key in plugin settings.
error.fillModelName: Please fill in the Cloud API model name in plugin settings.
error.cloudApiReturnedEmpty: Cloud API returned an empty translation.
error.bingAuthEmptyToken: Bing Auth returned an empty token.
error.timeout: Request timed out or was cancelled.
error.cannotConnectOllama: Cannot connect to Ollama. Please check the address and ensure Ollama is running.
error.ollamaConnectedButModelNotFound: Connected to Ollama, but model "${model}" was not found.
